com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXHarnessDiagram

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXDiagram, IXGraphicConversions, IXObject, IXWriteableObject

    public interface IXHarnessDiagram
extends IXDiagram
    Interface representing the Diagram of a HarnessXC design.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions

    • Method Detail

      • getDiagramFixtures

        java.util.Set<IXHarnessDiagramFixture> getDiagramFixtures()
        Get the Harness Diagram Fixture objects which are present on this harness diagram. If there are no harness diagram fixtures on this diagram, an empty set is returned.
        Returns:
        a Set of IXHarnessDiagramFixture present on the harness diagram

      • getDiagramDimensions

        java.util.Set<IXHarnessDiagramNodeDimension> getDiagramDimensions()
        Gett he Harness Diagram NodeDimension objects which are present on the harness diagram. If there are no harness diagram node dimensions on this diagram, an empty set is returned.
        Returns:
        a Set of IXHarnessDiagramNodeDimension present on the harness diagram

      • getDiagramBundles

        java.util.Set<IXHarnessDiagramBundle> getDiagramBundles()
        Get the Harness Diagram Bundle objects which are present on the harness diagram. If there are no harness diagram bundle objects on this diagram, an empty set is returned.
        Returns:
        a Set of IXHarnessDiagramBundle present on the harness diagram

      • getDiagramAxialDimensions

        java.util.Set<IXHarnessDiagramAxialDimension> getDiagramAxialDimensions()
        Get the Harness Diagram AxisDimension objects which are present on the harness diagram. If there are no harness diagram axis dimensions on this diagram, an empty set is returned.
        Returns:
        a Set of IXHarnessDiagramAxialDimension present on the harness diagram

      • getRegions

        java.util.Set<? extends IXHarnessDiagramRegion> getRegions()
        Retrieves all regions in this diagram
        Returns:
        a Set of all IXHarnessDiagramRegion present on this diagram

      • getBorderAsRegion

        IXHarnessDiagramRegion getBorderAsRegion()
        Retrieves the border as a region. Used to express coordinates with respect to border's bottom left corner for drill points not contained in any user created region. This region has not been created by the user and has no name. For example, the following code sample would locate a given diagram object by providing all regions containing it, including the border if no actual region is found. 
         
      IXHarnessDiagram diagram = ...  // the diagram we are working on
      Rectangle2D objExtent = ... // the extent of the object we are locating

      Set<IXHarnessDiagramRegion> locations = new HashSet<IXHarnessDiagramRegion>()

      for (IXHarnessDiagramRegion region : diagram.getRegions()) {
			if (region.getAbsoluteExtent().contains(objExtent.getCenterX(), objExtent.getCenterY())) {
				locations.add(region);
			}
		}

		if (locations.isEmpty()) {
			// No actual region contains this object -> use the border as a region
	    	IXHarnessDiagramRegion region = diagram.getBorderAsRegion();
	    	if (region != null) {
	        	locations.add(region);
	    	}
		}
        Returns:
        The region representing the border, or null if no border is present in this diagram
